query: How does CBACT02C add new accounts?

results.name: 1300-POPUL-ACCT-RECORD
results.preamble:
File: CBACT01C.cbl
Program: CBACT01C - BATCH COBOL Program - READ THE ACCOUNT FILE AND WRITE INTO FILES.
Paragraph: 1300-POPUL-ACCT-RECORD (lines 215-241)
References: COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CODATECN
Calls: CALL ASSEMBLER, CALL COBDATFT
results.summary: paragraph 1300-POPUL-ACCT-RECORD in CBACT01C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVACT01Y, CODATECN. invokes: CALL ASSEMBLER, CALL COBDATFT. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
1300-POPUL-ACCT-RECORD.
           MOVE   ACCT-ID                 TO   OUT-ACCT-ID.
           MOVE   ACCT-ACTIVE-STATUS      TO   OUT-ACCT-ACTIVE-STATUS.
           MOVE   ACCT-CURR-BAL           TO   OUT-ACCT-CURR-BAL.
           MOVE   ACCT-CREDIT-LIMIT       TO   OUT-ACCT-CREDIT-LIMIT.
           MOVE   ACCT-CASH-CREDIT-LIMIT  TO OUT-ACCT-CASH-CREDIT-LIMIT.
           MOVE   ACCT-OPEN-DATE          TO   OUT-ACCT-OPEN-DATE.
           MOVE   ACCT-EXPIRAION-DATE     TO   OUT-ACCT-EXPIRAION-DATE.
           MOVE   ACCT-REISSUE-DATE       TO   CODATECN-INP-DATE
                                               WS-REISSUE-DATE.
           MOVE   '2'                     TO   CODATECN-TYPE.
           MOVE   '2'                     TO   CODATECN-OUTTYPE.

      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
      *CALL ASSEMBLER PROGRAM FOR DATE FORMATTING                     *
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
           CALL 'COBDATFT'       USING CODATECN-REC.

           MOVE   CODATECN-0UT-DATE       TO   OUT-ACCT-REISSUE-DATE.

           MOVE   ACCT-CURR-CYC-CREDIT    TO   OUT-ACCT-CURR-CYC-CREDIT.
           IF  ACCT-CURR-CYC-DEBIT EQUAL TO ZERO
               MOVE 2525.00         TO   OUT-ACCT-CURR-CYC-DEBIT
           END-IF.
           MOVE   ACCT-GROUP-ID           TO   OUT-ACCT-GROUP-ID.
           EXIT.
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: 1000-ACCTFILE-GET-NEXT
results.preamble:
File: CBACT01C.cbl
Program: CBACT01C - BATCH COBOL Program - READ THE ACCOUNT FILE AND WRITE INTO FILES.
Paragraph: 1000-ACCTFILE-GET-NEXT (lines 165-199)
References: COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CODATECN
Calls: PERFORM 1100-DISPLAY-ACCT-RECORD, PERFORM 1300-POPUL-ACCT-RECORD, PERFORM 1350-WRITE-ACCT-RECORD, PERFORM 1400-POPUL-ARRAY-RECORD, PERFORM 1450-WRITE-ARRY-RECORD, PERFORM 1500-POPUL-VBRC-RECORD, PERFORM 1550-WRITE-VB1-RECORD, PERFORM 1575-WRITE-VB2-RECORD, PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 1000-ACCTFILE-GET-NEXT in CBACT01C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVACT01Y, CODATECN. invokes: PERFORM 1100-DISPLAY-ACCT-RECORD, PERFORM 1300-POPUL-ACCT-RECORD, PERFORM 1350-WRITE-ACCT-RECORD, PERFORM 1400-POPUL-ARRAY-RECORD.... comment hint: I/O ROUTINES TO ACCESS A KSDS, VSAM DATA SET...               *.
results.content:
1000-ACCTFILE-GET-NEXT.
           READ ACCTFILE-FILE INTO ACCOUNT-RECORD.
           IF  ACCTFILE-STATUS = '00'
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT
               INITIALIZE ARR-ARRAY-REC
               PERFORM 1100-DISPLAY-ACCT-RECORD
               PERFORM 1300-POPUL-ACCT-RECORD
               PERFORM 1350-WRITE-ACCT-RECORD
               PERFORM 1400-POPUL-ARRAY-RECORD
               PERFORM 1450-WRITE-ARRY-RECORD
               INITIALIZE VBRC-REC1
               PERFORM 1500-POPUL-VBRC-RECORD
               PERFORM 1550-WRITE-VB1-RECORD
               PERFORM 1575-WRITE-VB2-RECORD
           ELSE
               IF  ACCTFILE-STATUS = '10'
                   MOVE 16 TO APPL-RESULT
               ELSE
                   MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT
               END-IF
           END-IF
           IF  APPL-AOK
               CONTINUE
           ELSE
               IF  APPL-EOF
                   MOVE 'Y' TO END-OF-FILE
               ELSE
                   DISPLAY 'ERROR READING ACCOUNT FILE'
                   MOVE ACCTFILE-STATUS TO IO-STATUS
                   PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS
                   PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
               END-IF
           END-IF
           EXIT.
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
results.comments: I/O ROUTINES TO ACCESS A KSDS, VSAM DATA SET...               *

results.name: 1500-POPUL-VBRC-RECORD
results.preamble:
File: CBACT01C.cbl
Program: CBACT01C - BATCH COBOL Program - READ THE ACCOUNT FILE AND WRITE INTO FILES.
Paragraph: 1500-POPUL-VBRC-RECORD (lines 276-286)
References: COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CODATECN
results.summary: paragraph 1500-POPUL-VBRC-RECORD in CBACT01C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVACT01Y, CODATECN. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
1500-POPUL-VBRC-RECORD.
           MOVE   ACCT-ID            TO VB1-ACCT-ID
                                        VB2-ACCT-ID.
           MOVE   ACCT-ACTIVE-STATUS TO VB1-ACCT-ACTIVE-STATUS.
           MOVE   ACCT-CURR-BAL           TO  VB2-ACCT-CURR-BAL.
           MOVE   ACCT-CREDIT-LIMIT       TO  VB2-ACCT-CREDIT-LIMIT.
           MOVE   WS-ACCT-REISSUE-YYYY    TO  VB2-ACCT-REISSUE-YYYY.
           DISPLAY 'VBRC-REC1:' VBRC-REC1.
           DISPLAY 'VBRC-REC2:' VBRC-REC2.
           EXIT.
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: 9000-ACCTFILE-CLOSE
results.preamble:
File: CBACT01C.cbl
Program: CBACT01C - BATCH COBOL Program - READ THE ACCOUNT FILE AND WRITE INTO FILES.
Paragraph: 9000-ACCTFILE-CLOSE (lines 388-405)
References: COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CODATECN
Calls: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 9000-ACCTFILE-CLOSE in CBACT01C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVACT01Y, CODATECN. invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
9000-ACCTFILE-CLOSE.
           ADD 8 TO ZERO GIVING APPL-RESULT.
           CLOSE ACCTFILE-FILE
           IF  ACCTFILE-STATUS = '00'
               SUBTRACT APPL-RESULT FROM APPL-RESULT
           ELSE
               ADD 12 TO ZERO GIVING APPL-RESULT
           END-IF
           IF  APPL-AOK
               CONTINUE
           ELSE
               DISPLAY 'ERROR CLOSING ACCOUNT FILE'
               MOVE ACCTFILE-STATUS TO IO-STATUS
               PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
           END-IF
           EXIT.

results.content:
9999-ABEND-PROGRAM.
           DISPLAY 'ABENDING PROGRAM'
           MOVE 0 TO TIMING
           MOVE 999 TO ABCODE
           CALL 'CEE3ABD' USING ABCODE, TIMING.

      *****************************************************************

results.name: 1350-WRITE-ACCT-RECORD
results.preamble:
File: CBACT01C.cbl
Program: CBACT01C - BATCH COBOL Program - READ THE ACCOUNT FILE AND WRITE INTO FILES.
Paragraph: 1350-WRITE-ACCT-RECORD (lines 242-252)
References: COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CODATECN
Calls: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 1350-WRITE-ACCT-RECORD in CBACT01C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVACT01Y, CODATECN. invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
1350-WRITE-ACCT-RECORD.
           WRITE OUT-ACCT-REC.

           IF OUTFILE-STATUS NOT = '00' AND OUTFILE-STATUS NOT = '10'
              DISPLAY 'ACCOUNT FILE WRITE STATUS IS:'  OUTFILE-STATUS
              MOVE OUTFILE-STATUS  TO IO-STATUS
              PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS
              PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
           END-IF.
           EXIT.
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: 0000-ACCTFILE-OPEN
results.preamble:
File: CBACT01C.cbl
Program: CBACT01C - BATCH COBOL Program - READ THE ACCOUNT FILE AND WRITE INTO FILES.
Paragraph: 0000-ACCTFILE-OPEN (lines 317-333)
References: COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CODATECN
Calls: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 0000-ACCTFILE-OPEN in CBACT01C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVACT01Y, CODATECN. invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
0000-ACCTFILE-OPEN.
           MOVE 8 TO APPL-RESULT.
           OPEN INPUT ACCTFILE-FILE
           IF  ACCTFILE-STATUS = '00'
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT
           END-IF
           IF  APPL-AOK
               CONTINUE
           ELSE
               DISPLAY 'ERROR OPENING ACCTFILE'
               MOVE ACCTFILE-STATUS TO IO-STATUS
               PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
           END-IF
           EXIT.

results.name: 1050-UPDATE-ACCOUNT
results.preamble:
File: CBACT04C.cbl
Program: CBACT04C - BATCH COBOL Program - This is a interest calculator program.
Paragraph: 1050-UPDATE-ACCOUNT (lines 350-371)
References: COPY CVTRA01Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVTRA02Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVTRA05Y
Calls: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 1050-UPDATE-ACCOUNT in CBACT04C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA01Y, CVACT03Y, CVTRA02Y, CVACT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
1050-UPDATE-ACCOUNT.                                                     
      * Update the balances in account record to reflect posted trans.          
           ADD WS-TOTAL-INT  TO ACCT-CURR-BAL                                   
           MOVE 0 TO ACCT-CURR-CYC-CREDIT                                       
           MOVE 0 TO ACCT-CURR-CYC-DEBIT                                        
                                                                                
           REWRITE FD-ACCTFILE-REC FROM  ACCOUNT-RECORD                         
           IF  ACCTFILE-STATUS  = '00'                                          
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT                                            
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT                                           
           END-IF                                                               
           IF  APPL-AOK                                                         
               CONTINUE                                                         
           ELSE                                                                 
               DISPLAY 'ERROR RE-WRITING ACCOUNT FILE'                          
               MOVE ACCTFILE-STATUS  TO IO-STATUS                               
               PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                   
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                       
           END-IF                                                               
           EXIT.                                                                
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: 1100-DISPLAY-ACCT-RECORD
results.preamble:
File: CBACT01C.cbl
Program: CBACT01C - BATCH COBOL Program - READ THE ACCOUNT FILE AND WRITE INTO FILES.
Paragraph: 1100-DISPLAY-ACCT-RECORD (lines 200-214)
References: COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CODATECN
results.summary: paragraph 1100-DISPLAY-ACCT-RECORD in CBACT01C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVACT01Y, CODATECN. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
1100-DISPLAY-ACCT-RECORD.
           DISPLAY 'ACCT-ID                 :'   ACCT-ID
           DISPLAY 'ACCT-ACTIVE-STATUS      :'   ACCT-ACTIVE-STATUS
           DISPLAY 'ACCT-CURR-BAL           :'   ACCT-CURR-BAL
           DISPLAY 'ACCT-CREDIT-LIMIT       :'   ACCT-CREDIT-LIMIT
           DISPLAY 'ACCT-CASH-CREDIT-LIMIT  :'   ACCT-CASH-CREDIT-LIMIT
           DISPLAY 'ACCT-OPEN-DATE          :'   ACCT-OPEN-DATE
           DISPLAY 'ACCT-EXPIRAION-DATE     :'   ACCT-EXPIRAION-DATE
           DISPLAY 'ACCT-REISSUE-DATE       :'   ACCT-REISSUE-DATE
           DISPLAY 'ACCT-CURR-CYC-CREDIT    :'   ACCT-CURR-CYC-CREDIT
           DISPLAY 'ACCT-CURR-CYC-DEBIT     :'   ACCT-CURR-CYC-DEBIT
           DISPLAY 'ACCT-GROUP-ID           :'   ACCT-GROUP-ID
           DISPLAY '-------------------------------------------------'
           EXIT.
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
